name: body
label: Body Content
description: Main page content. Supports rich text formatting.

name: summary
label: Summary
description: Brief description used in listings and as default meta description. Keep under 160 characters.

name: featured_image
label: Featured Image
description: Primary image for this page. Used in listings, social sharing, and as the main page image.

name: images
label: Image Gallery
description: Additional images for this page. Drag to reorder.

name: seo_title
label: SEO Title
description: Custom title for search engines. If blank, the page title is used. Keep under 60 characters.

name: seo_description
label: SEO Description
description: Custom meta description for search engines. If blank, the summary is used. Keep under 160 characters.
